title: sideritis incana var. virgata
intro: Sideritis incana var. virgata, also known as Mountain Tea or Greek Mountain Tea, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Greece and other parts of the Mediterranean. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis incana var. virgata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. Sideritis incana var. virgata can be consumed as a herbal tea, often combined with other herbs, or in capsule form, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
